channel.title: Security Consulting on Cyrentis
channel.description: Recent content in Security Consulting on Cyrentis

item.title: Perimeter Security
item.description: Perimeter consulting focuses on risk identification, alert process optimization, and cross-system coordination.

item.title: Low-altitude Security
item.description: Low-altitude consulting covers detection, verification, and emergency response to establish reliable aerial defense capability.

item.title: Bird Identification & Deterrence
item.description: Bird identification and deterrence consulting helps reduce bird-strike risk and improve operational safety in critical zones.
